title: System and method for analyzing network objects in a cloud environment
abstract: A method and system for providing textual insights on objects deployed in a cloud environment are provided. The method includes collecting object data on objects deployed in the cloud environment, wherein objects are deployed and operable at different layers of the cloud environment; identifying objects deployed in the cloud environment; constructing a visual representation of the cloud environment, including the identified objects and their relationships; and generating textual insights on the identified objects and their relationships using natural language processing.
claims: 1. A computer-implemented method for providing textual insights on objects deployed in a cloud environment, comprising: collecting object data on objects deployed in the cloud environment, wherein objects are deployed and operable at different layers of the cloud environment; identifying objects deployed in the cloud environment; constructing a visual representation of the cloud environment, including the identified objects and relationships between the identified objects; generating textual insights using natural language processing based on the identified objects and the relationships; and tagging the identified objects and respective relationships with the generated textual insights.
